Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and 
Auto-Assignment research files. Because the files have many variables, we have included several ways for users to 
quickly find the information they need:
